title: Owner signs in and reaches the owner dashboard
description: This verifies that an Owner can start sign-in and reach the owner dashboard after completing the owner authentication flow.

steps.description: Verify the owner dashboard is displayed

title: User signs in and reaches the user dashboard
description: This verifies that a User can sign in from the login page and land on the correct role-based dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the user ID field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user dashboard is displayed

title: Mentor signs in and reaches the mentor dashboard
description: This verifies that a Mentor can sign in from the login page and land on the correct role-based dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the mentor ID field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the mentor dashboard is displayed

title: Mark attendance from the attendance sheet
description: An owner can search the attendance sheet, mark a devotee present, and see the attendance state update.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for a devotee on the attendance sheet
Verify the attendance state updates for the selected devotee

title: Submit a public attendance check-in
description: A public attendee can open a QR-based check-in page, enter the required devotee details, and see the event attendance recorded.

steps.description: Navigate to a public attendance page
Fill in the required devotee information
Verify a check-in confirmation is visible
Verify the event attendance is recorded for the submitted devotee

title: User can log out from the dashboard and return to login
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can log out from the dashboard and is returned to the login page.

steps.description: Fill in the user ID field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Review and update attendance from an event detail page
description: An authenticated user can open an event, review attendance information, mark attendance, and see the updated status on the event detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Mark attendance for an assigned devotee
Verify the updated attendance status is visible on the event page

title: Signed-in user sees role-specific dashboard content
description: This verifies that a signed-in user lands on a dashboard with role-appropriate stats and event information.

steps.description: Fill in the user ID field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify role-specific dashboard stats are displayed
Verify assigned event information is displayed

title: Owner searches and edits a devotee record
description: This verifies that an Owner can find a devotee in the database, update the record, and see the saved change reflected in the list.

steps.description: Open the devotee record for editing
Verify the updated devotee entry is displayed

title: Owner adds a new devotee to the database
description: This verifies that an Owner can create a new devotee record and see it appear in the database list.

steps.description: Start adding a new devotee record
Fill in the required devotee details
Verify the new devotee entry is displayed

title: Signed-in mentor can navigate away from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a Mentor can use dashboard navigation to reach another available section.

steps.description: Fill in the mentor ID field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Use the sidebar to open another available section
Verify the selected section is displayed

title: View event-specific attendance summary
description: An authenticated user can open an event detail page and review the event summary and attendance-related information.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the event summary is displayed

title: Owner deletes a devotee record from the database
description: This verifies that an Owner can remove a devotee record and confirm it no longer appears in the active list.

steps.description: Create or locate a devotee record to remove
Verify the devotee entry is no longer displayed

title: Open a devotee profile and review history details
description: A user can open a devotee profile page and review the devotee's history and chanting or contact details.

steps.description: Verify the devotee profile is displayed
Verify history and chanting or contact details are displayed

title: Owner imports devotee records from CSV
description: This verifies that an Owner can import devotee data from a CSV file and see the imported records added to the database.

steps.description: Verify imported devotee records are displayed

title: Search devotees on the attendance sheet
description: An owner can search the attendance sheet and narrow the visible devotee list to matching results.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for a devotee on the attendance sheet

title: Owner exports devotee data from the database
description: This verifies that an Owner can export devotee data from the database successfully.

steps.description: Verify the export action is available and completes
